iterations.theme: The Essence and Practice of Authentic Evangelization
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire transcript forms a single, cohesive speech on evangelization, flowing logically from definition to practical application. The total duration of the podcast (approx. 21 minutes) does not allow for multiple iterations of 35-45 minutes as per the strict rule, thus the entire content is presented as one thematic unit.

chapters.topic: Uvod: Osobno iskustvo Boga kao temelj evangelizacije
Autentičnost evangelizatora: Balans života i vjere
Tri ključna pitanja Pape Pavla VI.
Evangelizacija počinje od sebe: Crkva kao muzej
Drugi korak: Približi se s empatijom
Treći korak: Kreni od konkretne situacije
